posts.title: DeepSeek official website
posts.description: Official DeepSeek site - minimal content via web_fetch, main content likely behind JS/china-cdn restrictions. Follow updates via GitHub: github.com/deepseek-ai

note: DeepSeek主站受中国大陆CDN限制，内容无法直接抓取。最新发布建议关注GitHub: https://github.com/deepseek-ai
